---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for the project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## What would you like to see added or improved?

<!-- Describe your idea clearly. What should change or be added? -->
<!-- Example: "Add a 'Copy definition' button to each glossary card." -->

## Why would this be useful?

<!-- Help us understand the value. Who would benefit from this? When? -->
<!-- Example: "Students and beginners often want to copy definitions to their notes." -->

## What would a good solution look like?

<!-- Describe what the finished feature should look/feel/behave like. -->
<!-- You don't need to know how to implement it  -  just describe the end state. -->
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar examples are very welcome. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? What are the trade-offs? -->
<!-- This is optional  -  skip it if you haven't thought about it. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else to add? Links to related issues, similar projects, relevant reading, etc. -->

---

**Note:** If you'd like to implement this feature yourself, say so in a comment after opening the issue! We'll help you get started.
